steps.t: Huorn acorns can be found throughout the eaves of Fangorn, bordering the Broadacres. Blackthorn asked you to gather Huorn acorns to summon his Huorns …
There are places to summon Huorns throughout the eaves of Fangorn, bordering the Broadacres. Blackthorn asked you to put the acorns in special places …
Blackthorn awaits your return in the eaves of Fangorn, bordering the Broadacres. You should return to Blackthorn and let him know that you have done a…
